title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: HAYSTACK RESERVOIR SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space (no lifeguard on duty). 9900 SW Haystack Drive Culver, OR 97734 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: March-November dawn to dusk Email (541) 447-1209 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-1209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: $5 DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook and Jefferson Counties Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
